lede: Our continuing education programme covers topics of interest to players of all levels. Workshops are directed by experienced musicians, and members regularly visit instruments across Surrey and further afield.

events.title: AGM & Annual Recital
events.location: All Saints' Church, Woodham, Woking GU21 5SH
events.description: Join us for our AGM, followed by tea before Tom Bell’s President’s Recital, featuring the newly restored and expanded Harrison organ.

events.title: London Organ Day
events.description: An opportunity to experience the large new Harrison & Harrison at the 40th LOD — Tom Bell’s final year as Artistic Director. More at iao.org.uk/london-organ-day.

events.title: Godalming Performing Arts Festival
events.description: The organ classes at the annual Godalming festival showcase performers from those who have recently started learning to those with many years of experience. No advance booking required for audience members.

events.title: Registration Workshop
events.location: St Mary's Church, West Horsley KT24 6TA
events.description: Explore the 2-manual Frobenius organ with its baroque characteristics. Bring music to experiment with suitable registrations.

events.title: Play the Organ at Canterbury Cathedral
events.description: A very special opportunity to play the amazing 89-stop, 4-manual 2020 Harrison & Harrison organ.

events.title: Composer Workshop
events.description: A continuation of our pre-covid ‘composer’ series, directed by Julian Cooper.

events.title: Improvisation Workshop
events.description: A workshop on basic improvisation. Details will be circulated to members and posted here once confirmed.
